name: vehplayer

former_names.name: VEPLA
former_names.reason: Collides with an unrelated Swedish B2B app (verksamhetsplatsen.se, construction/project-management software, live on Play Store + App Store). Different Nice class, probably not a hard legal blocker, but the repo carried two names for a while and that already caused real confusion (see docs/NEXT_SESSION.md's 'phantom v1' note). Retired entirely as of session 6, not just a working codename anymore.

tagline_primary: A car dashboard for your Tesla. Not a phone on a big screen.
taglines_supporting: Navigation, music and calls, laid out for a car screen. Your phone stays in your pocket.
Nothing leaves the car. No cloud, no relay, no account.
Nothing Google ships can turn this off.
category_definition: A car dashboard. Mirroring is the delivery mechanism, not the product. Every mirroring-only competitor (Tesla Display, TeslaMirror, Car Cast, TesAA/WebAA) is fighting over the commodity; vehplayer is the only one shipping a purpose-built dashboard.

naming_rule.app_title_and_icon: Never use 'Android Auto' or 'CarPlay', never imply endorsement, never use Apple's or Google's logos.
naming_rule.store_long_description_and_seo: Nominative comparison use is allowed and expected ('an alternative to Android Auto and CarPlay for cars with a browser instead of a head unit') - this is how the category is actually searched for.

domain.current_note: Placeholder - a personal/dev domain, 12 characters with two dots, reads as hobbyist on a car touchscreen. Not the intended launch domain.
domain.target_note: A short (ideally ~3-4 letter), hyphen-free, no-subdomain domain is planned before launch. Not yet chosen or purchased as of this writing - treat as an open [MENS] item, not a decided value, until the founder confirms a specific registration.

visual_identity.theme: warm dark with amber and gold accents
visual_identity.theme_note: Deliberately not the cool blue-grey every Android Auto/CarPlay clone and every mirroring competitor reaches for - closer to a dashboard's leather-and-dim-instrument-light feeling. Already implemented in CarDashboardActivity (android/app/src/main/res/values/colors.xml), treat as the brand, not as a theme that could change.
visual_identity.display_font: Space Grotesk (OFL-licensed, vendored in android/app/src/main/res/font/ and webclient assets/licenses/)

missing_assets: App icon (launcher size + Play listing size) - none exists yet
Wordmark for the store listing, the site, and the car-side connect screen
Store feature graphic, screenshots, short and long description

pricing.free: Full CarDashboardActivity experience (dashboard, now-playing, phone, messages) plus mirror mode with touch control. No time limit, no watermark, no nag.

pro.contents: In-app navigation, screen-off/virtual display Power Mode, low-latency or lossless browser audio, auto-connect, split view, multi-car profiles.

pricing.decided_not_subscription: One-time purchase, not subscription - direct counter-position to Car Cast, avoids a support obligation a solo-maintained product can't staff. See docs/GROWTH_SAAS.md §4 for the full reasoning.
